title: My Boards
subtitle: Manage your private groups and compete with friends
emptyHint: Create a new board or join one with a code

create.title: Create New Board
create.description: Create a private board to compete with your friends
create.successDescription: Your new board is ready to use
create.errorDescription: An error occurred while creating the board

join.title: Join a Board
join.description: Enter the 8-character join code to join a board
join.errorDescription: An error occurred while joining the board

delete.title: Delete Board
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete {boardName}? This action cannot be undone and all members will lose access.
delete.errorDescription: An error occurred while deleting the board

leave.title: Leave Board
leave.description: Are you sure you want to leave {boardName}? You will need a new invite code to rejoin.
leave.errorDescription: An error occurred while leaving the board

ranking.roleUpdateSuccess: Member role has been updated successfully

errors.nameMinLength: Board name must be at least 2 characters
errors.nameMaxLength: Board name must be 20 characters or less
errors.joinCodeFormat: Code must contain only uppercase letters and numbers
errors.notFoundDescription: This board doesn't exist. It may have been deleted by the owner.
errors.boardNotFoundDescription: This board doesn't exist or has been deleted. Redirecting to global board...
errors.notMemberDescription: You are not a member of this board. You may have been removed or never had access.
errors.errorOccurredDescription: An error occurred while trying to load this board. Please try again later.
errors.FORBIDDEN: You don't have permission to perform this action.
errors.BOARD_MEMBER_ALREADY_IN_BOARD: You are already a member of this board
errors.BOARD_INVALID_JOIN_CODE: Invalid join code. Please check and try again
errors.BOARD_LIMIT_REACHED: You have reached the maximum limit of 10 boards

share.shareHint: Anyone with this link can join your board
